title: phyllanthus celebicus
intro: Phyllanthus celebicus is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the Celebes tree or Phyllanthus tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus celebicus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Phyllanthus celebicus is typically prepared as a herbal decoction, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and fever.
